initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    d.forename, 
    d.surname, 
    MIN(l.milliseconds) AS fastest_lap_ms
FROM 
    drivers d
JOIN 
    lapTimes l ON d.driverId = l.driverId
WHERE 
    d.nationality = 'Spanish' 
    AND d.dob < '1982-01-01'
GROUP BY 
    d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname
ORDER BY 
    fastest_lap_ms ASC
LIMIT 10;
